"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, Symbol.toStringTag, { value: "Module" }); function createLRUCache(max) { const cache = /* @__PURE__ */ new Map(); let oldest; let newest; const touch = (entry) => { if (!entry.next) return; if (!entry.prev) { entry.next.prev = void 0; oldest = entry.next; entry.next = void 0; if (newest) { entry.prev = newest; newest.next = entry; } } else { entry.prev.next = entry.next; entry.next.prev = entry.prev; entry.next = void 0; if (newest) { newest.next = entry; entry.prev = newest; } } newest = entry; }; return { get(key) { const entry = cache.get(key); if (!entry) return void 0; touch(entry); return entry.value; }, set(key, value) { if (cache.size >= max && oldest) { const toDelete = oldest; cache.delete(toDelete.key); if (toDelete.next) { oldest = toDelete.next; toDelete.next.prev = void 0; } if (toDelete === newest) { newest = void 0; } } const existing = cache.get(key); if (existing) { existing.value = value; touch(existing); } else { const entry = { key, value, prev: newest }; if (newest) newest.next = entry; newest = entry; if (!oldest) oldest = entry; cache.set(key, entry); } }, clear() { cache.clear(); oldest = void 0; newest = void 0; } }; } exports.createLRUCache = createLRUCache; //# sourceMappingURL=lru-cache.cjs.map
